description_long: This is an L-shaped, multi-tiered shelving unit with a bold red frame and natural wood-colored shelves. The structure consists of four horizontal shelves on the longer section and three on the shorter perpendicular section, all supported by sturdy vertical and horizontal beams. The open design allows for easy access from the front and sides, making it suitable for storing or displaying items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces. The red frame appears to be made of painted metal or wood, providing both visual contrast and structural integrity. The shelves themselves are likely made of wood or a wood composite, offering a flat, stable surface for storage. The overall construction is robust, with no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, emphasizing functionality and accessibility.
description: L-shaped open shelving unit with a red frame and natural wood shelves, designed for accessible storage or display. Features four shelves on the long side and three on the short side, with a sturdy, industrial look.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full L-shape, four long shelves, and three shorter shelves on the side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the open, accessible design of the shorter section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shelving unit, emphasizing the red frame and shelf alignment.
description_view_3: Side view of the shorter section, showing the three shelves and the supporting frame structure.
